ab: yau paqenanem kaput ku ti utay. pataz kalingun mazas tu Ribang.
ch: 我有一個同學叫utay，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named utay, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: temaqsi ti nani, meliway aizipna ta kaputan tu bilu, sasupasan uu sasudadan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: qakelisa, siqazusa, siqatulu, qawman paliway aimi meniz timaizipana.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: wanayka sukaw waway na, pataz meliway tu Ribang nani, mai patadikud.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: Raylikuz taqa ti imi paliway timaizipana.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: yau ussiq deddan, masulun imi semaqsaqay.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: ta lazanan, ngid siabaRat ti utay, wanayka mekalingun ti mazas tu sakedisan.
ch: 路途中，utay想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, utay wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: ngid liway tu sakedisan, sumkil imi meniz timaizipana semanu,“ mai iku mazas qaya.”
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: muRing ti ti utay, qumnut ti semanu timaimian,“ manna taqa imu paliway tu sakedisan timaikuan!”
ch: utay急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: utay burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: semanu ti kaput timaizipana,“ nayau pataz isu mai mazas tu Ribang, maduna mai patadikud tu niliwayan su!”
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: temawaR na, semuRap ti ti utay maseq ta taqsian, patadikudan na ti niliwayan na tu Ribang ta kaputan na.
ch: 隔天上學，utay很早就到學校了，utay把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, utay arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: semubat ti ti utay tu kaput na semanu,“ qusazui si, suppaR ti iku mazas tu Ribang ku.” muwanay tu kaput na paliway timaizipana tu Ribang.
ch: utay向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: utay apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
